subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Verily this pure and righteous one seeketh Thy great mercy, feareth the fires of retribution, and yearneth to be healed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان تقی النقی یبغی رحمتک الکبری و یتقی من نیران الجزاء و یشتفی من
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
